channel.title: +Military on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Military on Vishvas's notes

item.title: gAdAdhar-singh tianjin
item.description: विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्) Gadadhar Singh was then serving in BIA sent to put down the Boxer rebellion. Victory at Tianjin On 14 July at 4:00 a.m., the walled city of Tianjin was attacked. The assault force was made up of the Japanese infantry, the English Marines and Bluejackets, and the American infantry. The city gate was protected by firmly placed blockades. The walls were fifty to sixty feet in height. Climbing them was, therefore, impossible.
